positive: A highly stylized, symmetrical illustration of a neon-drenched forest at twilight. The main subject is a cluster of geometric, fantastical flora and fauna, rendered in the art deco style. Deep indigo and electric teal dominate the background, contrasted sharply by luminous neon pink, brilliant cyan, and vibrant lime green accents. Key elements include crystalline mushrooms, stylized geometric butterflies with iridescent wings, and silhouettes of mythical, gentle forest creatures like glowing foxes and hummingbirds. The composition is centered and balanced, designed for maximum impact on apparel. Use clean lines, thick outlines, and a high contrast color palette. Cinematic volumetric lighting, vector art aesthetic, detailed stencil work, highly print-ready.
